articles.author: Al Jazeera
articles.title: EU hosts Taliban officials for the first time in talks on deportations - Al Jazeera
articles.description: The Taliban government is not recognised by any European country, despite this meeting in Brussels with EU officials.
articles.content:
A Taliban delegation has held talks with the European Union in Brussels for the first time, in a visit fiercely criticised by rights activists.
The meeting on Tuesday focused on diplomatic services … [+2904 chars]
